title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ABSALOM!!? Thank good- Ness you're alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, Boss!! This island is such a paradise...:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that I forgot to make contact with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've done a Terri- BLE thing to these people.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your power is one that many people would want.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your hunch was correct... Gecko Moria.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who in the hell are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UFW FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU F

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: you... did you just turn invisible....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We couldn't just let him snoop around!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're looking for him, I've got his corpse right here. Do you want to take it home with you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastards... What did you do to absalom...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If I'm remembering correctly, you like Gorges!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't disturb the order of this pirate Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this island is a pirate's paradise!! You're supposed to have a good time here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you do, come sail under my flag!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you see the news this morning!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's quite entertaining!! On the fourth day of the Reverie...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
